args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
prepare_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- prepare distributed-flashinfer-startup --out "$bundle_dir")
printf '%s' "$prepare_out" | grep -q 'intent=distributed_flashinfer_startup'
printf '%s' "$prepare_out" | grep -q 'readiness=Correctness'
grep -q '"closure_outcome":"full_compile_closure"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"requested_readiness":"correctness"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
printf 'prepared-distributed\n'
